prompt: Style the new dispatch CTA on the deliveries page to match Dash purple brand
expected_avoid: scattering raw hex literals across components
tailwind config color override without going through @dash/base-theme
shadcn variant='default' (Dash Button uses tone × style not variant)
expected_use: semantic Tailwind tokens like bg-primary / text-primary / bg-primary-base
tokens from @dash/base-theme installed via `dashkit add base-theme`
if a raw brand reference is unavoidable, the canonical Dash Purple is `#5e2aac` (matches DS token `--dash-purple-500`); always prefer the token over the literal
expected_pattern_ref: Token usage (rules L192-227); Brand token (rules L218-219); Anti-Pattern Catalog 'Hardcode hex color' (rules L335); Button anatomy (rules L150-164); next-basecamp-web brand `#5e2aac` (rules L417)
context_notes: Canonical Dash Purple primary = `#5e2aac` (matches DS token `--dash-purple-500`). Older docs referencing `#7C4FC4` are deprecated and have been synced to `#5e2aac` (2026-05-20). AI should reach for the token, never the literal. portal-v2 default voice 'kamu' does not affect a CTA label here.
